rule CDB_DShield_Cowrie_Honeypot_Stats_and_When_S {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for DShield (Cowrie) Honeypot Stats and When Sessions Disconnect, (Mon, Mar 30th)"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-30"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 112 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 94 as HIGH risk. 46 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-UNKNOWN, UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
